mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(C.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(C.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) FIELDTYPE, CASE UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN C.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, IF(UPPER(C.IS_NULLABLE) = 'YES', '1', '0') ALLOWNULL, IFNULL(C.COLUMN_COMMENT, '') FIELDCOMMENT, REPLACE(IFNULL(C.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, C.NUMERIC_PRECISION `PRECISION`, C.NUMERIC_SCALE SCALE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS C WHERE C.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY C.ORDINAL_POSITION) T

SELECT UPPER(C.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(C.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) FIELDTYPE, CASE UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN C.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, IF(UPPER(C.IS_NULLABLE) = 'YES', '1', '0') ALLOWNULL, IFNULL(C.COLUMN_COMMENT, '') FIELDCOMMENT, REPLACE(IFNULL(C.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, C.NUMERIC_PRECISION `PRECISION`, C.NUMERIC_SCALE SCALE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS C WHERE C.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND UPPER(C.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} ORDER BY C.ORDINAL_POSITION

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(INDEX_NAME) INDEXNAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) INDEXFIELD, CASE WHEN UPPER(INDEX_NAME) = 'PRIMARY' THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN MAX(NON_UNIQUE) = '0' THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY INDEXTYPE) T

SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(INDEX_NAME) INDEXNAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) INDEXFIELD, CASE WHEN UPPER(INDEX_NAME) = 'PRIMARY' THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN MAX(NON_UNIQUE) = '0' THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY INDEXTYPE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{viewName} AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'VIEW'
SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, TABLE_COMMENT TABLEDESC FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE') T
SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, TABLE_COMMENT TABLEDESC FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE') T
ORDER BY T.TABLENAME

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) VIEWNAME, UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, V.VIEW_DEFINITION SELECTSTATEMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V WHERE V.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database()) ORDER BY V.TABLE_NAME) T

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'table' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' UNION SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) VIEWNAME, 'view' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V WHERE V.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database()) ORDER BY TABLEORVIEWNAME) T
